description: A painted-style image of a white church with a tall steeple at dusk, used as a darkened background. Centered white text over a small cross presents several verses beginning 'Strength and honour are her clothing...' attributed to Proverbs 31:25-28, with 'One Homeland Under God' in small italics at the bottom.
notable_text: Strength and honour are her clothing; Proverbs 31:25-28; One Homeland Under God
